name: 非殖民化
subject: history
domain_name: 20世纪世界史 / 20th Century World History / 20th Century World History
curriculum_points: Students will be able to analyse the causes and processes of decolonization in two regions, evaluating the role of nationalist movements, colonial policies, and the Cold War (HL/SL).
Students will be able to assess the challenges faced by newly independent states in the post-colonial period.
